widget.label: Panth Hero Slider
widget.description: Drop a Panth Hero Slider anywhere — homepage, CMS pages, category pages, products. Pick a slider by its identifier.

parameter.name: slider_identifier
parameter.label: Slider Identifier
parameter.description: The slider's identifier (e.g. homepage_hero). Find it on Content → Panth Infotech → Hero Slider → Manage Sliders.
